items.desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

items.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
items.desc: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

items.name: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
items.desc: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

items.name: langchain-ai/deepagents
items.desc: Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.

items.name: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
items.desc: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

items.name: cloudflare/workerd
items.desc: The JavaScript / Wasm runtime that powers Cloudflare Workers
